overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player character moves from a covered pedestrian arcade past street vendors, along a busy multi-lane arterial road lined with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, and across a striped crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath commercial overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath large concrete pillars along a covered pedestrian walkway

entered.detail: massive structural concrete pillars supporting the overpass above
small street vendor stall with illuminated signage and red-and-white color scheme
tall cylindrical skyscraper with distinctive red neon ring lighting visible in the distance
rain-slicked reflective concrete pavement with blue accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass structure. Large pillars line the left side while a food stall kiosk occupies the right. The wet pavement reflects blue and neon lighting as pedestrians walk toward the camera, and the iconic red-ringed neon tower is visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner transition area with garbage collection

events.description: exits the covered walkway into open air, revealing the night sky and full cityscape

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past a pile of garbage bags toward the open street intersection

entered.detail: large pile of green and blue trash bags accumulated on the sidewalk corner
white and orange construction barriers lining the edge of the road
wide asphalt road with multiple lanes for vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide urban street corner. A pile of garbage bags sits on the right sidewalk while traffic barriers line the road edge. The neon tower grows larger in the center view as the camera approaches the intersection, and the sky becomes fully visible above the towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with neon commercial towers

events.description: slight leftward curve in path to follow the sidewalk along the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk parallel to moving traffic, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the multi-lane road with headlights on

entered.detail: bright orange metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street
large commercial building with prominent glowing RC logo in green and red neon
massive holographic advertising screens covering building facades
raised highway structure with glowing edge lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide multi-lane arterial road lined with orange safety railings. The RC logo building dominates the left side with its massive neon signage, while futuristic vehicles drive past on the right. The sidewalk curves slightly as the camera moves through the dense urban canyon of illuminated skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

events.description: steps onto the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk to cross the multi-lane road
approaching the covered area beneath the overpass bridge at the far side of the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide yellow-striped crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk and overpass

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black diagonal stripes
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the road ahead
steam or smoke rising from vents near the street edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera crossing a wide yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk. Steam rises from vents on the left as the camera approaches an overpass bridge structure ahead. The RC logo building recedes into the left background while the camera moves toward the covered area beneath the overpass, completing the street crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian arcade out into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where blue neon reflects off wet pavement and a food stall lines the walkway, with a distant red-ringed tower anchoring the horizon. As the camera exits the cover, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where the sky becomes visible between towering skyscrapers and the neon tower looms larger. The movement then shifts along a multi-lane arterial road, passing orange safety railings and the massive neon signage of the RC logo building while futuristic vehicles stream past. Finally, the camera crosses a yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk through rising steam, moving away from the illuminated urban canyon and back toward the shadow of an overpass bridge.
